Tests if a variable is of type string in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that initializes a global variable `a` with an empty string. It then uses an `assert` statement to verify that the type of `a` is a string. The functionality is narrow, focusing on the initialization and type checking of a single variable. This script is likely used for basic validation or testing purposes to ensure that the variable `a` is correctly set as a string.
